__prompts__.source_name: The name of the source, in CamelCase (e.g., 'MySource'). Use letters and numbers only, no hyphens, spaces, or special characters.
__prompts__.tap_id: The ID of the tap, in kebab-case (e.g., 'tap-mysource')
__prompts__.library_name: The name of the library, in snake_case (e.g., 'tap_mysource'). This is how the library will be imported in Python.
__prompts__.stream_type: The type of stream the source provides
__prompts__.stream_names: Comma-separated stream labels, e.g. [dim]users,User Groups,order-lines[/]. Each is normalized to [bold]snake_case[/] for Singer [code]name[/] and REST [code]path[/]; class names are PascalCase + [code]Stream[/]. Scaffold uses [bold]id[/] / [bold]modified_at[/] — fix via TODOs in [code]streams.py[/].
__prompts__.auth_method: The [bold red]authentication[/] method used by the source, for REST and GraphQL sources
__prompts__.oauth_access_token_via_hg: Get OAuth2 access token via Hotglue (hg)? [dim](Only applies when auth is OAuth2; choose no for all other auth types.)[/]
__prompts__.include_agent_instructions: Include an agent instructions file? AGENTS.md is the cross-tool standard; CLAUDE.md is specific to Claude Code.
